analysis.summary: The committed total already exceeds the $200,000 cap by $1,000. Three categories (music, flowers, transport) are still estimates, not contracts, and typically settle above quote. You haven't budgeted for gratuities or day-of extras.

warnings.issue: unsigned quotes ($33,000) usually rise 10–15% this close to the date
warnings.recommendation: Sign the DJ, florist and shuttle now

warnings.issue: set aside 5–10% for the surprises every wedding has
everything is due before the wedding day; push balances later where you can

analysis.payment_exposure: About $158,500 of the $201,000 committed is due before the wedding day — a heavy prepayment concentration driven by the venue.
